issues.detail: Does not cover error scenarios and edge cases.
Lacks concrete procedures and runnable code.
Missing checksum verification for source code download.

scenarios.name: C++ ACharacter with Blueprint-exposed health and overridable OnDeath
scenarios.rationale: Baseline gets UCLASS/UPROPERTY right but tends to miss the BlueprintNativeEvent + _Implementation pattern for Blueprint-overridable C++ events; treatment uses the documented UFUNCTION(BlueprintNativeEvent) with OnDeath_Implementation.

scenarios.name: Open-world rendering and streaming recommendation
scenarios.rationale: Baseline usually names Nanite and Lumen but often omits World Partition's auto-streaming role; treatment follows the skill and recommends all three with their specific roles.
